name: Syrian Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper - seeded and sliced
1 green bell pepper - seeded and sliced
3 oz feta cheese - sliced or crumbled
1/2 cup fresh parsley - stems removed, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the romaine lettuce, tear it into bite-sized pieces, and place in a salad bowl.
2. Arrange the other vegetables attractively over the romaine, topping with feta cheese, parsley, olives, and capers if using.
3. Combine the dressing ingredients: 1/4 cup olive oil, juice of one lemon, 1 tbsp wine vinegar, 1 garlic clove (pressed), salt to taste, fresh-ground black pepper to taste, and dried mint in a small bowl.
4. Drizzle the dressing over the salad before serving.
